events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: forcing a spool into alignment with excessive cold spring is treated as a **fail** (high risk) — this isn't the engineered, calculated cold spring ASME B31.3 §319.2.4 permits, it's an ad hoc fix for a fit-up discrepancy that loads the joint, supports, and equipment nozzles with unanalyzed stress. Recommended action: release the forcing rigging, re-verify spool/support dimensions against the iso, and correct via re-fab/re-route rather than closing out the weld/bolt-up under load.
